name: CVR Refining, LP
description: CVR Refining, LP is an independent downstream energy limited partnership that operates refining and related logistics assets in the Mid-Continent region of the United States. The company owns and operates a complex full coking medium-sour crude oil refinery in Coffeyville, Kansas, and a complex crude oil refinery in Wynnewood, Oklahoma. It also controls supporting logistics assets, including pipelines, storage tanks, and terminal facilities, to facilitate the sourcing of crude oil and the distribution of refined products such as gasoline, diesel fuel, and liquid petroleum gas.
